summary: Turns the Lua runtime itself into a templating language equally powerful, thanks to setfenv, load and table.concat. Features Jinja-based syntax.
raw_content: Turns the Lua runtime itself into a templating language equally powerful, thanks to setfenv, load and table.concat. Features Jinja-based syntax.
generated_summary: lyretemplates is a library for turning the Lua runtime into a templating language complete usually used in the fields of template.
phase1: A Lua library that enables the Lua runtime to function as a templating language, utilizing setfenv, load, and table.concat for syntax.
phase2: Supports Jinja-based syntax, allowing for powerful and flexible templating capabilities.
phase3: Designed for developers looking to extend Lua with custom templating features, offering a powerful alternative to traditional templating engines.
